headline: GEHC Moves Manganese-Based MRI Contrast Agent Into Phase 2/3 Trial
summary: GE HealthCare doses first patient in Phase 2/3 LUMINA trial for mangaciclanol, a manganese MRI contrast agent with FDA Fast Track status.

raw.headline: GEHC Moves Manganese-Based MRI Contrast Agent Into Phase 2/3 Trial
raw.summary: GE HealthCare doses first patient in Phase 2/3 LUMINA trial for mangaciclanol, a manganese MRI contrast agent with FDA Fast Track status.

headline: SNN's CARTIHEAL Cartilage Implant Beats Standard Care in 5-Year Study
summary: Smith+Nephew's CARTIHEAL implant shows superior 5-year outcomes vs. standard care, with a new CPT code set to boost adoption and expand cartilage repair reach.

raw.headline: SNN's CARTIHEAL Cartilage Implant Beats Standard Care in 5-Year Study
